items.title_en: Treasury Secretary Bessent says U.S. GDP growth can return to 3% before end of the year
items.title_zh: 财长贝森特称美国GDP增速可在年底前恢复至3%
items.desc_en: Bessent sees his "3-3-3" plan as still in reach — 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP rate and a 3 million barrels per day increase in oil production.
items.desc_zh: 贝森特认为他的“3-3-3”计划仍然可以实现——经济增长 3%，赤字占 GDP 比例降低 3%，石油产量每天增加 300 万桶。

items.title_en: We checked thousands of Amazon Prime Day deals — here’s 207+ worth buying - NBC News
items.title_zh: 我们检查了数千个亚马逊 Prime Day 优惠——这里有 207 多个值得购买的商品 - NBC 新闻

items.desc_zh: 我们检查了数千个亚马逊 Prime Day 优惠 - 这里有 207 多个值得购买的商品 NBC News 我们在购买了数千个优惠后发现了 137 个最佳亚马逊 Prime Day 优惠 CNN Prime Day 在这里：我们发现了 65 个以上

items.title_en: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.title_zh: 联合国核负责人表示，作为战争协议的一部分，视察员将访问伊朗场地
items.desc_en: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.
items.desc_zh: 拉斐尔·格罗西表示，国际原子能机构正在“研究具体方式”，但伊朗部长表示，这种准入只是与美国达成的最终协议的一部分。

items.title_en: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, AMD, Reddit, Blackberry, Arm, Take-Two, Barclays & more
items.title_zh: 以下是周三最重要的分析师电话会议：Nvidia、Tesla、AMD、Reddit、Blackberry、Arm、Take-Two、Barclays 等
items.desc_en: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 以下是周三华尔街最大的呼吁。

items.title_en: These chip stocks are surging due to sky-high CPU demand. UBS sees more gains ahead
items.title_zh: 由于 CPU 需求极高，这些芯片库存正在飙升。瑞银预计未来将有更多收益
items.desc_en: Advanced Micro Devices and ARM Holdings could see their shares appreciate further as hyperscalers order more CPUs to power their AI models, according to UBS.
items.desc_zh: 瑞银表示，随着超大规模企业订购更多 CPU 来为其人工智能模型提供支持，Advanced Micro Devices 和 ARM Holdings 的股价可能会进一步升值。

items.title_en: Wendy's stock soars as meme traders target another turnaround play
items.title_zh: 随着模因交易员瞄准另一场扭亏为盈，温迪的股价飙升
items.desc_en: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.
items.desc_zh: 虽然管理层变动会影响投资者的情绪，但变动的幅度表明可能还有其他因素在起作用。

items.title_en: Slate Auto says each $24,950 electric pickup truck will be profitable as it aims to be cash-flow positive next year
items.title_zh: Slate Auto 表示，每辆售价 24,955 美元的电动皮卡都将实现盈利，目标是明年实现正现金流
items.desc_en: EV startup Slate Auto CEO Peter Faricy told CNBC that every vehicle the company produces will be gross margin positive.
items.desc_zh: 电动汽车初创公司 Slate Auto 首席执行官 Peter Faricy 告诉 CNBC，该公司生产的每辆车都将实现正毛利率。

items.title_en: Democrats see midterm hope in reliably red Iowa as Trump approval ratings sag
items.title_zh: 随着特朗普支持率下降，民主党人在爱荷华州看到了中期选举的希望
items.desc_en: The path back to a House majority could run through states such as Iowa, where Democrats in recent elections have struggled to win over rural voters.
items.desc_zh: 重返众议院多数席位的道路可能会经过爱荷华州等州，这些州的民主党人在最近的选举中一直难以赢得农村选民的支持。

items.title_en: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing
items.title_zh: 韩国最大芯片制造商SK海力士计划通过纳斯达克上市筹集290亿美元资金
items.desc_en: The company plans to issue 17.79 million new shares at a value of 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion).
items.desc_zh: 该公司计划发行 1779 万股新股，价值 45.45 万亿韩元（296.5 亿美元）。

items.title_en: Trump claims Iran has assured U.S. there won't be tolls on the Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 特朗普声称伊朗已向美国保证霍尔木兹海峡不会造成人员伤亡
items.desc_en: There will be no tolls, insurance costs, or charges of any kind for ships looking to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，对于希望通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只，不会收取通行费、保险费或任何形式的费用。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘
items.desc_en: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 表示，该游戏的实体副本将包含该游戏的数字下载代码。

items.title_en: France suffers major power outage as Europe sizzles in record-breaking heat
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇创纪录高温，法国遭遇严重停电
items.desc_en: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.
items.desc_zh: 创纪录的高温席卷欧洲，导致法国西部约 68,000 户家庭停电。

items.title_en: France confirms first Ebola case
items.title_zh: 法国确认首例埃博拉病例
items.desc_en: More than 260 people in the Democratic Republic of Congo are known to have died during the current outbreak.
items.desc_zh: 据了解，刚果民主共和国已有 260 多人在此次疫情中死亡。

items.title_zh: 455 名明尼苏达州提供商在全国范围内被指控 $6.5B 的“医疗保健欺诈打击” - 5 目击者新闻
items.desc_en: 7 Minnesota providers among 455 charged in nationwide $6.5B 'health care fraud takedown'  5 EYEWITNESS NEWSExclusive | Justice Department Unveils $6.5 Billion Healthcare Fraud Crackdown  WSJHouston wo

items.title_en: Tech companies would have to pay AI data center energy costs under bill moving in Congress
items.title_zh: 根据国会提出的法案，科技公司必须支付人工智能数据中心的能源成本
items.desc_en: A House subcommittee may advance legislation Wednesday to make tech companies pay the energy costs for operating data centers to power AI.
items.desc_zh: 众议院小组委员会可能会在周三推进立法，要求科技公司支付运营数据中心以支持人工智能的能源成本。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes knock out power in key city in Russian-occupied Crimea
items.title_zh: 乌克兰空袭摧毁了俄罗斯占领的克里米亚主要城市的电力
items.desc_en: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
items.desc_zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔在莫斯科任命的州长警告说，一些地区直到晚上才会停电。

items.title_en: France braces for another day of sweltering heat as Europe heatwave spreads
items.title_zh: 随着欧洲热浪蔓延，法国准备迎接又一天的酷暑
items.desc_en: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.
items.desc_zh: 预计热浪将于周三蔓延至西欧其他地区，然后在周末向东延伸。

items.title_en: Defense stocks plummet on report Germany is scrapping warships; Rheinmetall stock down 13%
items.title_zh: 有报道称德国正在报废军舰，国防股暴跌；莱茵金属股价下跌13%
items.desc_en: Berlin is planning to scrap a multi-billion-euro project to build the F126 frigates, according to the Financial Times.
items.desc_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，柏林正计划取消一项耗资数十亿欧元的 F126 护卫舰建造项目。

items.title_en: French woman allegedly held captive by husband for 12 years rescued in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 法国女子据称被丈夫囚禁12年在巴基斯坦获救
items.desc_en: Yasmina alleges she was held along with her five children, and they were all cut off from the outside world.
items.desc_zh: 亚斯米娜声称，她和五个孩子一起被关押，他们都与外界隔绝。

items.title_en: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚因致命学校火灾而指控学生谋杀
items.desc_en: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.
items.desc_zh: 上个月，Utumishi 女子学校的宿舍发生火灾，造成 16 名年龄在 15 岁至 18 岁之间的学生死亡。

items.title_zh: 邦迪海滩枪击英雄对袭击父亲的指控不认罪

items.title_en: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
items.title_zh: 谷歌 YouTube 与青少年就社交媒体成瘾案达成和解
items.desc_en: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.
items.desc_zh: 这位 15 岁的原告对另外三家科技巨头的诉讼将于下个月开始。

items.title_en: A decade after Brexit, UK voters reflect on decision to break from European Union - PBS
items.title_zh: 英国退欧十年后，英国选民反思脱离欧盟的决定 - PBS
items.desc_en: A decade after Brexit, UK voters reflect on decision to break from European Union  PBSTen years on, Brexit's economic impact is becoming clearer  BBCBritain Is Still Deep in the Shadow of Brexit  The
items.desc_zh: 英国脱欧十年后，英国选民反思脱离欧盟的决定 PBS 十年过去了，脱欧的经济影响变得更加清晰 BCB 英国仍深陷脱欧阴影之中

items.title_en: Germany rail network comes to complete halt nationwide due to IT malfunction
items.title_zh: 由于IT故障，德国铁路网络在全国范围内完全停止
items.desc_en: Rail company Deutsche Bahn has paused train services across the country due to a nationwide IT disruption.
items.desc_zh: 由于全国范围内的 IT 中断，铁路公司德国铁路公司已暂停全国范围内的火车服务。

items.title_en: E-commerce giant Alibaba sues US government over defence blacklist
items.title_zh: 电子商务巨头阿里巴巴就国防黑名单起诉美国政府
items.desc_en: The e-commerce giant is suing the US defence department after it was added to a blacklist of firms with ties to the Chinese military.
items.desc_zh: 这家电子商务巨头被列入与中国军方有联系的公司黑名单后，正在起诉美国国防部。

items.desc_zh: 用于设备上滑动打字的开放模型

items.title_en: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.title_zh: 卢比奥警告不要过路费 联合国表示将疏散滞留在霍尔木兹海峡的水手
items.desc_en: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.
items.desc_zh: 美国国务卿卢比奥警告伊朗，任何国家都不能向通过该海峡的船只收取费用。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We're at one of Europe's biggest tech events.
items.desc_zh: 我们正在参加欧洲最大的科技活动之一。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.title_zh: 美伊达成协议后数十艘船只驶过霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
items.desc_zh: 自美国和伊朗签署旨在结束战争的协议以来，该水道的交通量有所增加，仅周六就有 42 艘船只。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.title_zh: 女演员警告说，这不仅仅是裸体问题 - 图像和网络虐待的复杂现实

items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。

items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令如何重塑我们所有人使用互联网的方式

items.desc_zh: 为什么有些人认为社交媒体禁令可能会对年轻人获取新知识以及我们其他人在网上活动的方式产生深远影响

items.desc_zh: Nex Playground 将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。
